content: Part 1a: Add next_draw_time helper + seed all 3 draws with ISO UTC values
Part 1b: Advance next_draw_time after execute_draw (+1 / +7 / +14 days)
Part 2: CountdownTimer component with DD:HH:MM:SS + DRAW LIVE state
Part 3: Integrate timer into all 3 draw cards (DrawCard.js)
Part 4: Integrate larger timer into DrawDetailPage below hero
Verify: screenshots + next_draw_time advances after Run T1 demo
